type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Port Colborne Refinery was down for Q3 due to Preventative Maintenance Period and due to the Work Stoppage at Vale's Sudbury Operations.

In 2020, the Port Colborne facility underwent a Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment (HIRA).  At the Cobalt Hydrate Plant, replacement of liquid chlorine with sodium hypochlorite, as a cobalt precipitating agent, was identified as a major risk reduction.  The replacement occurred in Q4 of 2020.  The resultant process adjustment period occurred throughout 2021.  During the early efforts of the reagent change, small particle size material passed through to the Nickel circuit and eventually ended up at the MISA water discharge point to Lake Erie.

09/27/2022
Mark Ceccanese

comments.comment: New additional residue from Copper Iron Cake disposed of at PCR Landfill in addition to the ETP Cake.

reasonsForPlan.en: Plan was required by notice under the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999
reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan exigé par un avis de planification de la prévention de la pollution publié en vertu de la Loi canadienne sur la protection de l'environnement, 1999

reasonsForPlan.en: Plan was prepared or implemented for another government jurisdiction or Parliament (i.e. provincial government)
reasonsForPlan.fr: Plan préparé ou mis en œuvre pour une autre autorité gouvernementale (c.-à-d., autre ministère fédéral, province, municipalité)

noticeType.en: Base metals smelters and refineries and zinc plants (specified toxic substances)
noticeType.fr: Fonderies et affineries de métaux communs et les usines de traitement du zinc (certaines substances toxiques)

p2Plan.planComment: The Pollution Prevention Plan for Base Metals Smelters was completed and a Declaration of Completion was submitting for the reporting year 2012.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Substance, process or technology alternatives are unknown or unavailable
reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Des substances, procédés ou technologies de rechange sont inconnues ou ne sont pas disponibles
